Landing.hero_subtitle: Access over 3,000 interactive books on any device. Use stars earned to build your own Avatar and Rocket ship and earn badges for reading and quiz completion.
Landing.banner_alt: Kids reading app showing dashboard with badges, books on tablet and phone, and interactive reading room
Landing.highlights_title: Everything Your Child Needs to Love Reading
Landing.highlights_subtitle: A complete reading platform designed for children and trusted by parents worldwide
Landing.books_description: A vast library of leveled readers for every skill level
Landing.device_description: Read seamlessly on desktop, tablet, or smartphone
Landing.badges_description: Fun achievements that motivate kids to keep reading
Landing.read_anywhere_title: 3,000+ Books at Your Fingertips, On Any Device
Landing.read_anywhere_description: Whether at home on the computer, traveling with a tablet, or waiting with a smartphone - your child's entire reading library travels with them. Progress syncs automatically across all devices.
Landing.sync_feature: Seamless sync across PC, tablet, and mobile
Landing.resume_feature: Pick up exactly where you left off
Landing.browser_feature: Works on any modern browser - no app required
Landing.badges_section_subtitle: Turn reading into an adventure! Children earn exciting badges and rewards as they progress, making them eager to read more every day.
Landing.stars_description: Kids earn stars for every book read and quiz completed. Watch their collection grow!
Landing.achievement_description: 50+ unique badges to unlock for reading streaks, quiz scores, and level completions.
Landing.level_description: Visual level-up system shows children their reading skills improving over time.
Landing.getting_started_subtitle: Join thousands of families who are building confident readers. Get started in just 4 simple steps.
Landing.step_create_account_desc: Sign up in seconds with your email.
Landing.step_add_student: Add a student to your account
Landing.step_add_student_desc: Purchase a subscription or use an activation code to add a student to your account.
Landing.step_get_credentials: Get your login credentials from email or from your dashboard
Landing.step_get_credentials_desc: Access over 3,000 books on any device. Your child can read, listen, and complete fun quizzes.
Landing.step_start_reading_desc: Watch your child's reading skills grow.
Landing.feature_leveled_desc: Access over 3,000 books across 29 reading levels, from beginner to advanced readers.
Landing.feature_audio_desc: Every book includes professional narration to help with pronunciation and comprehension.
Landing.feature_quizzes_desc: Fun comprehension quizzes after each book to reinforce learning and understanding.
Landing.feature_progress_desc: Detailed reports show reading growth, time spent, and books completed over time.
Landing.feature_bilingual_desc: Books available in both English and Japanese to support language learning goals.
Landing.feature_personalized_desc: Adaptive technology adjusts to your child's pace and recommends perfect-fit books.
Landing.about_subtitle: Raz-Japan combines proven reading pedagogy with engaging technology to create a comprehensive literacy program. Our platform adapts to each child's unique learning style, making reading practice enjoyable and effective.
Landing.built_by_educators: Built by Educators, Loved by Families
Landing.built_by_educators_desc: Developed in collaboration with reading specialists and teachers, Raz-Japan is grounded in research-based literacy instruction. Our mission is to make every child a confident, enthusiastic reader.
Landing.contact_subtitle: Have questions? Our friendly support team is here to help you and your family succeed.
Landing.footer_tagline: Empowering children to become confident, enthusiastic readers through personalized, engaging literacy experiences.
